item.title: Muse Image and Video
item.description: Meta’s first in-house image and video generation models, with agentic reasoning, ranking #2 on Arena leaderboards.

item.title: Fast, High-Fidelity Video Editing
item.description: Text-prompted, high-fidelity video edits in under 30 seconds — local edits, scene transformations, and composite requests.

item.title: Human detectors are surprisingly powerful reward models
item.description: Using human detection confidence as a simple yet effective reward model to improve human motion in video generation.

item.title: Toward Diffusible High-Dimensional Latent Spaces: A Frequency Perspective
item.description: Introducing FreqWarm, a plug-and-play frequency warm-up curriculum that improves high-dimensional latent diffusion by increasing early-stage exposure to high-frequency signals.

item.title: Diffusion Autoencoders are Scalable Image Tokenizers
item.description: Simplified image tokenization using diffusion

item.title: LLMs can see and hear without any training
item.description: Pure text-only LLMs can use off-the-shelf multimodal embedding models to do various multimodal tasks!

item.title: MotiF: Making Text Count in Image Animation with Motion Focal Loss
item.description: Using flow to improve motion in video generation

item.title: Movie Gen: A Cast of Media Foundation Models
item.description: State-of-the-Art Video (+Audio) Generation Model

item.title: The Llama 3 Herd of Models
item.description: State-of-the-Art open-source LLM with multimodal capabilities

item.title: SoundingActions: Learning How Actions Sound from Narrated Egocentric Videos
item.description: Self-supervised embedding to learn how actions sound from narrated in-the-wild egocentric videos.

item.title: InstanceDiffusion: Instance-level Control for Image Generation
item.description: SOTA instance-conditioned diffusion model for image generation.

item.title: Generating Illustrated Instructions
item.description: Introducing a new task of generating instructions for the task you want to solve with illustrations, and a LLM + Diffusion model based solution.

item.title: Motion-Conditioned Image Animation for Video Editing
item.description: Image animation FTW again! SOTA video editing results by animating the first frame with motion conditioning.

item.title: VideoCutLER: Surprisingly Simple Unsupervised Video Instance Segmentation
item.description: SOTA unsupervised video segmentation using CutLER.

item.title: Emu Video: Factorizing Text-to-Video Generation by Explicit Image Conditioning
item.description: A simple and effective approach to high-quality video generation by learning to animate high quality images.

item.title: ImageBind: One Embedding Space To Bind Them All
item.description: One embedding space for 6 different modalities, enables zero-shot recognition on all modalities!

item.title: The effectiveness of MAE pre-pretraining for billion-scale pretraining
item.description: Scaling up MAE pre-pretraining, followed by weakly supervised pretraining, leads to strong representations.

item.title: CutLER: Cut and Learn for Unsupervised Object Detection and Instance Segmentation
item.description: Discovering objects using DINO features, and learning an unsupervised detection + segmentation model

item.title: HierVL: Learning Hierarchical Video-Language Embeddings
item.description: Video-language embeddings are a promising avenue for injecting semantics into visual representations, but existing methods capture only short-term associations between seconds-long video clips and their accompanying text. We propose HierVL, a novel hierarchical video-language embedding that simultaneously accounts for both long-term and short-term associations.

item.title: Learning Video Representations from Large Language Models
item.description: Leveraging LLMs to auto-annotate videos for representation learning.

item.title: OmniMAE: Single Model Masked Pretraining on Images and Videos
item.description: Single self-supervised representation for images and videos.

item.title: Omnivore: A Single Model for Many Visual Modalities
item.description: A single model for images, video and single-view 3D.

item.title: Ego4D: Around the World in 3,000 Hours of Egocentric Video
item.description: The largest egocentric video dataset.

item.title: Detecting Twenty-thousand Classes using Image-level Supervision
item.description: Leverages image classification data to build an object detector

item.title: Mask2Former for Video Instance Segmentation
item.description: SOTA video segmentation using Mask2Former.

item.title: Masked-attention Mask Transformer for Universal Image Segmentation
item.description: Single architecture state-of-the-art in instance, semantic and panoptic segmentation.

item.title: 3DETR: An End-to-End Transformer Model for 3D Object Detection
item.description: First Transformer based detection architecture for 3D data.

item.title: Anticipative Video Transformer
item.description: An autoregressive video transformer architecture for action anticipation in videos.

item.title: 3D Spatial Recognition without Spatially Labeled 3D
item.description: WyPR can detect and segment objects in a 3D scene without needing any spatial labels at all!

item.title: Self-Supervised Pretraining of 3D Features on any Point-Cloud
item.description: SOTA 3D detection/segmentation results by learning contrastive representations on 3D data

item.title: Physical Reasoning Using Dynamics Aware Embeddings
item.description: Self-supervised representations for physical reasoning.

item.title: Forward Prediction for Physical Reasoning
item.description: Forward prediction for PHYRE benchmark.

item.title: CATER: A diagnostic dataset for Compositional Actions and TEmporal Reasoning
item.description: A dataset to evaluate temporal reasoning in video models.

item.title: MetaPix: Few-Shot Video Retargeting
item.description: A dataset to evaluate temporal reasoning in video models.

item.title: DistInit: Learning Video Representations Without a Single Labeled Video
item.description: Distilling representations from image models to video models.

item.title: Video Action Transformer Network
item.description: Among the first applications of Transformers to model videos. SOTA results: close 2nd at AVA Challenge, CVPR'18.

item.title: Detect-and-Track: Efficient Pose Estimation in Videos
item.description: Human keypoint tracking approach that ranked first in ICCV 2017 PoseTrack keypoint tracking challenge!

item.title: Attentional Pooling for Action Recognition
item.description: Among the first applications of attention for contemporary video/action understanding.

item.title: ActionVLAD: Learning spatio-temporal aggregation for action classification
item.description: Aggregating visual features for action recognition.

item.title: Binge Watching: Scaling Affordance Learning from Sitcoms
item.description: Learning how humans interact with their environment by watching TV.

item.title: Learning a Predictable and Generative Vector Representation for Objects
item.description: A single embedding space, good for both generating and understanding 3D models
